subject: Re:
body:
do you have a current job? did you get fired?". 


----- Original Message ----
From: Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com>
To: JE <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Thursday, April 5, 2007 5:17:21 AM
Subject: 


Jeffrey,
My 2nd time job hunting is different since I already have a network. It's nonetheless very distressing and draining. I'm getting favors from anyone who can help and when this is all over, I will owe a lot of people. At least there's nothing wrong w/ my networking skills!  
 
So my first job experience in Dubai was bad. Islamic Finance Co took the unethical road and didn't pay me for my time worked or my expenses. They did however benefit from my valuation model, finding loopholes to get out of a bad deal, and efforts to recruit. 
 
I guess this is all called Life.
 
Always love,
-- 
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062
